proofLedger.rootCause: GitHub main (f531009c) was live but missing 12,361 lines of business workflows (member accounts, deal tracking, investor protection, wallet) that existed only in the Rork sandbox local. Two separate git histories with no common ancestor. Additionally, summarizeDeals() crashed on null participants array, and payment-sync had 6 iterations of schema fixes on GitHub that the sandbox didn't have.
